notes.textNote: Past peak, beginning to open at the top. Harvest soon.
Ready to harvest. Moisture low, prioritise watering after picking.
Nearly ready, harvest within the next two days.
Overdue for harvest, root starting to crack. Pick immediately.
Soil moisture low, consider watering more frequently.
Past harvest date, beginning to bolt. Harvest immediately.
Overripe, fruit splitting and softening. Should have been harvested days ago.
Overripe, root becoming woody and cracking. Harvest or remove immediately.
Slightly past peak, still salvageable. Harvest soon.
Almost ready, harvest in a few days.
Starting to yellow at the tips, overdue for harvest.
Almost ready, check again in two days.
Signs of blight on lower leaves. Treat and monitor urgently.
Significantly overdue. Bolting and moisture critically low in this row.
Early growth stage, water this row urgently.
